content.text:
Course:
University Work 1 (UW1) — Semester 1, Unit UM1, Credits: 2, Coeff: 2
Course Objectives
Positive participation in university life.
Giving a good image of the university.
Course Content
Part 1: LMD Training System
The university, its social role and its objectives in global development
The training system in the Bachelor's, Master's and Doctorate
Explanation of terms: field, department and specialization
Meaning of the educational unit: Fundamental, Methodological, Discovery, Transverse
Meaning of credit, coefficients, individual work
Nature of pedagogical assessment: lectures, practical work, Tutorial session
Conditions for transition and success during the training course
University guidance criteria and bridges and crossings between training courses
Part 2: Distance Education via Electronic Platforms
The university student is the focus of the educational process
Modern technologies in the educational and learning process
E-learning platforms (Moodle, MOOCs, DUAl, etc.)
Part 3: Training on University Work Techniques
Using research methods and technological applications in study and research
Preparing a reading sheet and summarizing lessons
Preparing and presenting works using specialized applications
Part 4: Integration into University Life
What is University Life
Emotional Intelligence and Teamwork Skills
Pedagogical Support for People with Disabilities and Their Integration into University Life
Participation in Scientific, Cultural and Sports Activities
Psychological Assistance Centers within the University
Teaching Mode
Elearning (80%), Face to face mode (20%)
Assessment Mode
Exam (60%), Continuous assessment (40%)
Recommended Textbooks
MINISTERE DE L’ENSEIGNEMENT SUPERIEUR ET DE LA RECHERCHE SCIENTIFIQUE. Guide pratique de mise en œuvre et de suivi du LMD. Alger : MESRS, 2011.
BARKLEY, Elizabeth F. Student engagement techniques: a handbook for a college faculty. USA: Jossey-Bass, 2010.
O’SHEA, Sarah [et al]. First in family students, university experience and family life: motivations, transitions and participation. Australia: Mc-Milan, 2017.
ROBERTS, Andrew. The thinking student guide to college: 75 tips for getting a better education. Chicago: University Chicago Press, 2010.
